subject: Active Management Operating System
rationale: Build the management system before forcing deep analytical conclusions.
supporting_evidence: live panel created; trigger system created; cadence created
invalidation_condition: if the operating system proves too heavy or too vague in live use

subject: Cash
rationale: Cash is being treated as active optionality until core theses and trigger discipline mature.

subject: INBR32
rationale: Keep exposure unchanged for now, but treat it as highest-priority review because concentration risk is obvious.

subject: INBR32
rationale: Formal thesis now exists: fundamentals improved materially, but current position size still demands a higher proof threshold; maintain without adding.
supporting_evidence: FY2025 results showed 25M active clients, +36% credit growth, NIM 9.6%, net income R$1.3B and annualized ROE above 15%
